aspirations.intent: Define a canonical Track format spec — a structured per-session event format for AI session continuity across the WAI fleet.
aspirations.spirit_summary: Give AI agents a durable, machine-readable record of what happened in a session so context survives across sessions and compaction.

aspirations.intent: Ship three track-capture prompt variants (active-collection, closing-request, prep-and-request) and upgrade them to rich v2/v0.24 capture with post-compaction hooks.
aspirations.spirit_summary: Different session moments need different capture prompts; richer capture yields higher-fidelity tracks for downstream reconstruction.

aspirations.intent: Provide reference sample tracks covering distinct session archetypes: coding, learning, and strategy sessions.
aspirations.spirit_summary: Concrete examples anchor the format spec and act as a corpus for testing track tooling and prompts.

aspirations.intent: Build a headless Station Master handler in lib/station/ sitting between /api/ routes and storage, exposing /api/tracks for track submission.
aspirations.spirit_summary: Decouple HTTP routing from track-processing logic so the same handler can serve API, batch, and headless ingestion paths reliably.

aspirations.intent: Deploy a Vercel sidecar cron to keep the Appwrite database warm and prevent cold-start/idle suspension.
aspirations.spirit_summary: Serverless free-tier databases idle out; a scheduled keepalive guarantees track ingestion never hits a cold/suspended backend.

aspirations.intent: Run a historian initial theme sweep over the tracks corpus and rebuild/reconstruct 22 sessions of tracks for pattern analysis.
aspirations.spirit_summary: Reconstruct and theme the accumulated track corpus so historical sessions become queryable intelligence rather than dead logs.

aspirations.intent: Build a chat-to-track exporter skill/prompt that converts raw chat logs into the canonical track event format.
aspirations.spirit_summary: Let sessions that didn't capture tracks natively be retro-converted, widening corpus coverage from any chat transcript.

aspirations.intent: Provide a track-generate skill that produces well-formed track event entries on demand.
aspirations.spirit_summary: Standardize track emission via a skill so agents append schema-valid entries instead of hand-rolling JSON.

aspirations.intent: Reorganize the Skills/ tree under a skills-authority-policy with a planned post-cutover refactor and reconciliation workstreams.
aspirations.spirit_summary: As skills proliferated (slim/reference/full variants), a single authority policy and cutover plan was needed to prevent skill drift and duplication.

aspirations.intent: Define a universal Anti-Hallucination Specification Pattern for preventing AI invention/drift when filling track and spec fields.
aspirations.spirit_summary: Track fidelity depends on agents not fabricating fields; a reusable spec pattern enforces grounded, verifiable capture.

decisions.description: Retire the bytype/signal/ canonical structure and migrate to signal v2; 63 legacy signals archived.
decisions.rationale: Old flat/by-type signal storage caused orphaned signals; v2 consolidates and archives history cleanly.

decisions.description: Station Master is a headless handler in lib/station/ between API routes and storage, not logic embedded in /api/ routes.
decisions.rationale: Separating routing from processing makes the track ingestion path testable and reusable across entry points.

decisions.description: Always connect to Supabase via the pooler host, never the direct DB host.
decisions.rationale: The direct Supabase DB host resolves IPv6-only and is unreachable from WSL2; the pooler is the only working path.

decisions.description: Provider-specific database clients must not sit behind a generic DATABASE_URL abstraction.
decisions.rationale: A generic URL hides provider quirks (auth, pooling, dialect) that the specific client must handle explicitly.

decisions.description: NEXTAUTH_URL must be set to the base domain only (e.g. https://www.wheelwright.ai).
decisions.rationale: NextAuth derives callback paths from the base; including a path breaks auth redirects.

decisions.description: The tracks spoke operates in maintenance-only mode, characterized as a 'documentation_and_prompt_library'.
decisions.rationale: Tracks is primarily a spec/prompt/sample artifact library; gardener sessions route teachings/mail but execute little net-new work.

decisions.description: Migrate the tracks spoke harness to v1.1, updating WAI-State.json and copying harness files.
decisions.rationale: Keep the spoke aligned with the current fleet harness contract for hooks and session tracking.

open_threads.description: lug-station-orchestrator-v1 remained open with no PEV/acceptance_criteria and a directive NOT to auto-execute; only lug-station-schema-v1 was ever executed, so the orchestrator half of Station Master is unbuilt.
49 open lugs (almost all undelivered/open signals) accumulated without delivery or resolution — a growing signal backlog never routed to the hub or actioned.
Recurring tool-call / read-file loop-detection repeatedly blocked incoming mail routing across many sessions; root cause never fixed, only worked around session-to-session.
Anti-Hallucination Specification Pattern was captured as a 'universal pattern' signal but never traced to an implementation or adoption — status unresolved.
Session 2 'Teaching adoption + prompt variants v0.24' remains an open session-summary lug; unclear whether the v0.24 prompt-variant line was fully closed out vs. superseded by later v0.39 track work.

orphan_implementations.description: Web track viewer (browser UI to render a track library) — no aspiration trail in any session; appears only in the codebase.
Skills authority/post-cutover planning artifacts (overnight refactor plans, reconciliation report, workstream jsonl) exist without a session-level decision record.
Ozi autopilot advisors seeded into the spoke via teaching adoption rather than a spoke-originated aspiration.
orphan_implementations.evidence: f0b3807 feat: adopt 20260523-ozi-autopilot teaching — seed advisors/autopilot/

orphan_implementations.description: src/lib code tree backing Station Master — implementation present but only partially traced to stated intent (schema executed, orchestrator never built).
orphan_implementations.evidence: src/lib, signal lug 'Station Master API production-ready after critical bug fixes'

orphan_lug_work.title: Harness migration to v1.1 for tracks
Resume activity and update last_updated for tracks
